description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shower head fixture with a sleek, minimalist design, primarily finished in a glossy black material. The main shower head is mounted on a vertical bar, with a secondary handheld shower wand attached to the side via a flexible hose. The fixture includes a flat, square spray plate with multiple small nozzles for water dispersion, and a matching rectangular bracket for the handheld wand. The vertical bar is anchored at both the top and bottom, likely for wall mounting, and the hose is neatly looped at the base. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A sleek, black, wall-mounted shower fixture with a rectangular main head and a handheld wand attached by a flexible hose. The design is modern and minimalist, featuring clean lines and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full vertical bar, main rectangular shower head, and handheld wand with hose attached to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the vertical bar and the flat, square shape of the main shower head extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vertical bar, the mounting brackets, and the hose attachment at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the main shower head and the hose looping down from the base.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a slim, rectangular wand with a smooth surface and rounded edges, designed for comfortable grip and easy maneuverability. It appears to have a simple, ergonomic form without visible texture or additional controls.
